Send Feedback

Rate the app and send a message to the author.

★★★★★
Sends to dbsuelan@revlv.com

Welcome to TwaTemplato

Quick tips to get productive fast:

  1. Start from a preset — Presets ▸ Network Infrastructure or CCTV Surveillance give you a complete, realistic starting diagram.
  2. Add equipment — open Tools and tap an object; drag it into place. Tap an object to select it (delete ✕ and resize handles appear).
  3. Connect objects — drag from the blue dot on an object to another object. Tap a cable to change its color/type.
  4. Rename anything — tap any text (labels, title block) to edit it. Fonts auto-fit.
  5. Field Report — tap a photo frame to upload, or use the 📷 camera button for a live geotagged capture. Annotate with shapes and text.
  6. Export — one tap on Export PDF Sheet. Editing helpers never appear in the PDF.

Reopen anytime: File ▸ Interactive Tutorial / Quick Tips

Workspace reset successfully. ✕
